failure_modes.cause: Vapour pressure of solvent exceeds pump inlet pressure at T > 40°C
failure_modes.mitigation: Pressurise feed reservoir to 0.5 bar above vapour pressure

failure_modes.cause: Precipitation of reaction by-products at high concentration
failure_modes.mitigation: Regularly flush system with solvent and monitor pressure drop

failure_modes.cause: BPR valve fails to open at set pressure
failure_modes.mitigation: Install pressure relief valve and perform regular BPR maintenance

single_points_of_failure: BPR valve — blockage stops all flow
validation_experiments: Run blank solvent at Q=0.5 mL/min for 60 min; monitor pressure for drift > 5%
Perform a pressure relief test by simulating BPR failure and ensure relief valve activates
Conduct a solubility test of reaction by-products in solvent at operating conditions
